sessions.notes: Defensive literal identity fix + intersection this-type binding fix.
Cross-type Function/Callable inference (+4) + Lazy resolution in inference (+1).

Build fix (stale call site). Tried BCT union fallback (-14 regressions, reverted). Tried targeted from_index_signature union (-19 regressions, reverted). Index sig inference requires a new candidate flag that distinguishes 'named property against index sig' from other index sig contexts.

known_dead_ends: BCT get_common_supertype_for_inference union fallback: too broad, causes 14 regressions.
from_index_signature flag union combination: too broad, causes 19 regressions. The flag is set for multiple contexts, not just named-property-to-index-sig.
Union source distribution in inference: causes 11 regressions.
infer_matching.rs Object-to-index-sig: code not reached for generic calls.
Most remaining FPs need generic call inference improvements, not core subtyping.
promising_leads: Need a NEW candidate context flag: 'from_named_property_to_index_signature' (distinct from general 'from_index_signature'). Only candidates with this specific flag should be combined via union. This would fix inferenceOptionalPropertiesToIndexSignatures without regressions.
Callable overload matching with generic signatures.
